name: Strawberry Frost
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor with metal blade, combine the yogurt, ricotta, frozen strawberries, vanilla and orange juice.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Spoon into parfait glasses and garnish with berries and a mint sprig, if desired.
4. Serve immediately.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 MILK EXCHANGE + 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE; CAL: 81; CHO: 6mg; CAR: 13g; PRO: 5mg; SOD: 72mg; FAT: 1g.
